context.summary: Proof 033 teacher seasoning lesson P033-FLOW-006 for FLOW.

task: SEASON mechanism lesson into the pond. Mechanism=FLOW. Domain=library_returns. Observations=books enter the return desk; movement must use the sorting belt; the one scanner throat limits passage; shelves receive fewer books. Causal chain=Supply appears before a route.; The route must carry the supply forward.; A local limiting point reduces passage.; Upstream accumulation rises while downstream arrival falls.. Consequence signature=arrival rate falls; waiting grows before limiter; far side receives less. Return bounded motifs and lineage only.
